nasb.text: ‘Cursed is he who lies with his sister, the daughter of his father or of his mother.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

esv.text: “‘Cursed be anyone who lies with his sister, whether the daughter of his father or the daughter of his mother.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

cnv.text: “‘和同父異母，或是同母異父的姊妹同寢的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

ccb.text: ‘凡与同父或同母姊妹乱伦的必受咒诅！’ 全体民众要回答说，‘阿们！’
